message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 60
  BoxPadding 20
  LifeLineBorderColor #000000
  LifeLineBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ParticipantBorderColor #000000
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6FA
  ActivationBorderColor #000000
  ActivationBackgroundColor #FFFFFF
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
  FontSize 24
}
skinparam defaultFontSize 24

participant "«Tariff»\nAgileTariff" as AgileTariff
participant "Scheduler" as Scheduler

AgileTariff -> AgileTariff : poll()

alt [AgileTariff periods updated]
  AgileTariff -> Scheduler : getNextCheck
  Scheduler --> AgileTariff : getNextCheck

  alt [earliest new AgileTariff period is before nextCheck]
    AgileTariff -> Scheduler : setNextCheck(now)
    Scheduler --> AgileTariff
  end
end

@enduml
